reference: My ten-year-old son fell and banged his leg on Sunday. He has developed a solid lump on his lower leg about an inch away from his shin bone on the outside of his leg. He has no pain except when you press it. It is hard like bone and about one inch long. Should I be concerned?
text: My 10-year-old son is well-indicted right onto it. He has developed a solid lump on his lower leg about an increasingly thin bone on the outside of his leg. He has no pain except when he stretches; it is hard like bone and about 1 inch long. Should I be concerned?
